reason: Authoritative phase machine (collecting_params) + the dynamic_prompt-is-sole-context-authority rule (D4-MW). Defines params_draft {from_user, recommended, lab_logistics} shape and the from_user carry fields (solvent_ratio/solvents/volume_ml) the injection surfaces. I-ST-F documents the missing-param-clarify rule the reuse rule sits beside.

reception_node ctx->GraphState projection, specialist subgraph topology (rehydrate->react->emit), plan executor Literal[cc,re] constraint + TLC sequence vision (why CC needs the mirror). Confirms rehydrate does NOT inject context -- dynamic_prompt middleware is the injection site.

SessionContext is frozen; ctx.trials[job_id] / ctx.latest_trial(job_id) / ctx.find_trial(trial_id) are the read-only lookup convention the prior-step resolver must use. Confirms all plan jobs' trials are hydrated into the same ctx CC/RE receive (reachability precondition).

The task's own PRD: verified facts (data reachable via ctx, prompt blind), the two locked decisions (dynamic_prompt injection, mirror into both CC+RE), acceptance criteria, out-of-scope (no merge engine, LLM owns reuse).
